title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka chooses her dream, the Japanese Derby,
over her competition with her rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When she makes her entrance, the crowd erupts
in cheers that are a mix of anticipation and
disdain. Her opponents also give her cold stares.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Vodka shrugs it all off and runs in the
race she's always dreamed of in order to show
everyone her true way of life.
